meta.title: A4 Paper Actual Size — 210 × 297 mm on Your Screen
meta.description: See an A4 sheet of paper (210 × 297 mm) at its true physical size. The world's most common paper size, used in over 160 countries.
meta.h1: A4 Paper — Actual Size on Screen
facts: Used in over 160 countries (all except US and Canada)

meta.title: US Letter Paper Actual Size — 8.5 × 11 Inch on Screen
meta.description: See a US Letter sheet (215.9 × 279.4 mm / 8.5 × 11 in) at its true physical size on your screen. The standard paper size in the US and Canada.
meta.h1: US Letter Paper — Actual Size on Screen
facts: Used primarily in the USA and Canada
Slightly wider and shorter than A4
